title: uranthera variabilis
intro: Uranthera variabilis, also known as the Variable Uranthera, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is a tropical plant native to Southeast Asia, where its leaves and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The plant contains flavonoids and phenolic compounds with potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Uranthera variabilis can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs, to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
